violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Salad prep cooler at 44-46F
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not designed and/or maintained properly. -Replace filters on left side of grill.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Clean big ice machine in main kitchen. -Clean ice machine in CCII.--Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean soup ladles on rack more thoroughly. -Deep clean or replace cutting board on prep table. -Clean big can opener in CCII.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean fan covers in main walk in cooler. -Clean and remove rust in main walk in cooler. -Clean shelving in dish pit and in dry storage.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Not emitting sanitizer in CCII.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors and floor edges need cleaned in main kitchen and in CCII.
